narrative.zh: 飞船需要精确控制速度才能进入轨道！调整速度曲线让飞船到达空间站！
narrative.en: The spaceship needs precise speed control to enter orbit! Adjust the speed curve to reach the station!

narrative.zh: 太空陨石来了！用几何形状搭建防护盾！
narrative.en: Asteroids incoming! Build a shield with geometric shapes!

narrative.zh: 导航系统出故障了！通过概率实验判断哪条路线最安全！
narrative.en: Navigation system malfunction! Use probability experiments to find the safest route!
